panels.description: Sum of all Cursor tokens consumed by the whole team in the selected period (input + output + cache write + cache read).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) AS "Team Total Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Team Total Token Usage

panels.description: Average number of tokens consumed per Cursor request in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
    2
  ) AS "Avg Tokens / Request"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Average Tokens per Request

panels.description: Percentage of total tokens served from cache (read + write) in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(SUM(cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100.0
    / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0), 0),
    2
  ) AS "Cache Token Share %"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

panels.title: Cache Token Share

panels.description: Daily token volume trend for input, output, cache write, cache read, and overall total.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE(timestamp) AS time,
  SUM(input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens",
  SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS "Cache Write Tokens",
  SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS "Cache Read Tokens",
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) AS "Total Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp)
ORDER BY DATE(timestamp)

panels.title: Daily Token Consumption Trend

panels.description: Per-user token totals in the selected period. Includes input, output, cache read, cache write, and overall total.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  user_email AS "User",
  SUM(input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens",
  SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS "Cache Write Tokens",
  SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS "Cache Read Tokens",
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) AS "Total Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY user_email
ORDER BY SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Per-User Token Usage

panels.description: Token consumption by model to identify where most usage is concentrated.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS "Model",
  COUNT(*) AS "Requests",
  SUM(input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens",
  SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS "Cache Write Tokens",
  SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS "Cache Read Tokens",
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) AS "Total Tokens",
  ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS "Charged (USD)"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
ORDER BY SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Top Models by Token Usage

panels.description: Effective cost per 1K tokens by model using both charged cost (after credits/discounts) and gross cost (before credits).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown') AS "Model",
  COUNT(*) AS "Requests",
  SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) AS "Total Tokens",
  ROUND(SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS "Charged (USD)",
  ROUND(SUM(total_cents) / 100.0, 4) AS "Gross (USD)",
  ROUND((SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0), 6) AS "Charged USD / 1K Tokens",
  ROUND((SUM(total_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0), 6) AS "Gross USD / 1K Tokens"
FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) > 0
ORDER BY (SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Effective Cost per 1K Tokens by Model

panels.description: Highest charged USD per 1K tokens among models in the selected period. Use as a quick signal for cost drift.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(MAX(cost_per_1k), 6) AS "Highest Charged USD / 1K Tokens"
FROM (
  SELECT
    (SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0
    / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) AS cost_per_1k
  FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
  HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) > 0
) t

panels.title: Highest Charged USD per 1K Tokens

panels.description: Lowest charged USD per 1K tokens among models in the selected period. Useful baseline for model efficiency.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(MIN(cost_per_1k), 6) AS "Lowest Charged USD / 1K Tokens"
FROM (
  SELECT
    (SUM(charged_cents) / 100.0) * 1000.0
    / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) AS cost_per_1k
  FROM _tool_cursor_usage_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(model, ''), 'Unknown')
  HAVING SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_write_tokens + cache_read_tokens) > 0
) t

panels.title: Lowest Charged USD per 1K Tokens
